name: Gesture Demo
script:
on swipeLeft
  go next card
end swipeLeft

on swipeRight
  go previous card
end swipeRight

buttons.name: stacks
buttons.title: Stacks
buttons.script:
on mouseUp
  show stacks
end mouseUp

fields.name: hint
fields.text: Swipe LEFT for next card. Long-press the button.

buttons.name: press
buttons.title: Long-press me
buttons.script:
on longPress
  put "status: LONG-PRESSED" into field "status"
end longPress

on doubleTap
  put "status: DOUBLE-TAPPED" into field "status"
end doubleTap

buttons.name: toProd
buttons.title: Open Productivity
buttons.script:
on mouseUp
  go to stack "Productivity"
end mouseUp

fields.name: hint
fields.text: Swipe RIGHT to go back. Swipe LEFT for card 3.

fields.name: hint
fields.text: Swipe RIGHT to go back to card 2.
